option.name: originalContent
option.value:
package com.example.gestion_mobilek.app
import com.example.gestion_mobilek.R import com.example.gestion_mobilek.app.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.data.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.reminders.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.sync.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.common.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.future.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.history.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.items.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.main.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.persons.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.ui.settings.* import com.example.gestion_mobilek.utils.*
import android.app.Application
class GestionMobileKApp : Application() { override fun onTrimMemory(level: Int) { super.onTrimMemory(level) if (level == TRIM_MEMORY_UI_HIDDEN) { ExternalSyncManager.requestBackgroundPush(applicationContext) } } }

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Contenu principal --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_menu" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_more_vert" app:tint="@android:color/white"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Zone d'actions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:paddingTop="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<!-- Ligne du haut --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal" android:weightSum="2">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnIngredients" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_ingredients" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFutureRecettes" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_future_recettes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Bouton central mis en avant --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPersonnes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="170dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:elevation="6dp" android:text="@string/home_personnes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Action secondaire large --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPlats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#4A90E2" android:text="@string/home_plats" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnConnectExternal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_connect_external" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDataSourceStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/home_data_source_local" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- BottomSheet noir glissable --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/bottomSheet" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#1A1A1A" android:orientation="vertical" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:behavior_peekHeight="80dp" app:layout_behavior="com.google.android.material.bottomsheet.BottomSheetBehavior">
<!-- Trait blanc glissable --> <View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:alpha="0.5" android:background="#FFFFFF"/>
<!-- Bouton Historique --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnHistorique" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/home_historique" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<!-- Séparateur --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="#333333"/>
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:text="@string/home_last_meals" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<!-- 3 derniers repas --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerLastMeals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#F5F5F5" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Contenu principal --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="#4A90E2" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:contentDescription="@string/home_menu" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:src="@drawable/ic_more_vert" app:tint="@android:color/white"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Zone d'actions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:paddingTop="32dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="18dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold"/>
<!-- Ligne du haut --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal" android:weightSum="2">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnIngredients" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_ingredients" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnFutureRecettes" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_future_recettes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:gravity="center" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="17sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Bouton central mis en avant --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPersonnes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="170dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:elevation="6dp" android:text="@string/home_personnes" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Action secondaire large --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPlats" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:backgroundTint="#4A90E2" android:text="@string/home_plats" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<Button android:id="@+id/btnConnectExternal" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" android:text="@string/home_connect_external" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textStyle="bold" app:cornerRadius="24dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDataSourceStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/home_data_source_local" android:textColor="#666666" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- BottomSheet noir glissable --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/bottomSheet" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#000000" android:orientation="vertical" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:paddingBottom="20dp" app:behavior_peekHeight="100dp" app:layout_behavior="com.google.android.material.bottomsheet.BottomSheetBehavior">
<!-- Trait blanc glissable --> <View android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="4dp" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:alpha="0.5" android:background="#FFFFFF"/>
<!-- Bouton Historique --> <Button android:id="@+id/btnHistorique" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/home_historique" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="#7B68EE" app:cornerRadius="24dp"/>
<!-- Séparateur --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="#333333"/>
<!-- Label --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:text="@string/home_last_meals" android:textColor="#AAAAAA" android:textSize="13sp"/>
<!-- 3 derniers repas --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/containerLastMeals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <style name="Theme.Gestion_MobileK" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.Light.NoActionBar"> <item name="android:forceDarkAllowed" tools:targetApi="q">false</item>
<!-- Violet pour les boutons --> <item name="colorPrimary">#8200AD</item> <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">#6A5ACD</item> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@android:color/white</item>
<!-- Bandeau bleu inchangé (défini direct en XML, pas via colorPrimary) --> <item name="android:windowBackground">#F5F5F5</item> <item name="android:textColor">#212121</item>
<!-- Arrondi sur tous les boutons --> <item name="materialButtonStyle">@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button</item> <item name="shapeAppearanceSmallComponent">@style/ShapeAppearance.App.SmallComponent</item> </style>
<!-- Rajoute ce style en dehors du premier --> <style name="ShapeAppearance.App.SmallComponent" parent="ShapeAppearance.MaterialComponents.SmallComponent"> <item name="cornerFamily">rounded</item> <item name="cornerSize">24dp</item> <!-- Plus grand = plus arrondi, 50% = pilule --> </style> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools"> <style name="Theme.Gestion_MobileK" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.Light.NoActionBar"> <item name="android:forceDarkAllowed" tools:targetApi="q">false</item>
<!-- Violet pour les boutons --> <item name="colorPrimary">#8200AD</item> <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">#4A90E2</item> <!-- Changed to Blue for status bar --> <item name="colorOnPrimary">@android:color/white</item>
<item name="android:statusBarColor">#4A90E2</item> <item name="android:navigationBarColor">#000000</item>
<!-- Bandeau bleu inchangé (défini direct en XML, pas via colorPrimary) --> <item name="android:windowBackground">#F5F5F5</item> <item name="android:textColor">#212121</item>
<!-- Arrondi sur tous les boutons --> <item name="materialButtonStyle">@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button</item> <item name="shapeAppearanceSmallComponent">@style/ShapeAppearance.App.SmallComponent</item> </style>
<!-- Rajoute ce style en dehors du premier --> <style name="ShapeAppearance.App.SmallComponent" parent="ShapeAppearance.MaterialComponents.SmallComponent"> <item name="cornerFamily">rounded</item> <item name="cornerSize">24dp</item> <!-- Plus grand = plus arrondi, 50% = pilule --> </style> </resources>
